name: Legendary Psycho
description: Legendary Psycho is a legendary Bandit-manufactured class mod for Krieg in Borderlands 2. It can drop from any appropriate loot source, with better odds from raid bosses.
notes:
Krieg class mods were added to the drop pool on 18 April 2013.

Unlike most other legendary class mods, Legendary Psycho does not reduce Action Skill cooldown.

It is the only class mod with two separate red flavour text lines, reflecting Krieg's two voices.

special.description:
At max level it provides: +40% Burn Damage, +40% Magazine Size, and +1.5s Shield Recharge Delay.

It boosts 6 skills rather than the usual 5 (with a few other legendary class mod exceptions).

Red text: "- One day I'll escape this hell and you'll be gone. - NIPPLE SALADS!"
special.title: "One day I'll escape this hell and you'll be gone." "NIPPLE SALADS!"
